subcodes.first_line: The All-Glorious Truth proclaimeth: O My handmaiden! Thy mention hath been recorded before the Throne, and the Divine Tongue hath given utterance to this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق عزیز میفرماید ای کنیز من ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و لسان الهی باین لوح ناطق تا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
